causalAutopsy.notes: Born from the 2026-06-16 incident: an age-limit recycle tagged midWork:false because getTopicForSession returned null at the kill instant, so the active autonomous run was never offered to the resume queue and silently died while its state file said active. Twin of the heartbeat (PR #1207): heartbeat covers alive-but-quiet, this covers dead-but-marked-active. Fixes the root-cause null at source AND adds the level-triggered reconciler backstop.
